info.title: Etherpad API
info.description: Etherpad is a real-time collaborative editor scalable to thousands of simultaneous real time users. It provides full data export capabilities, and runs on your server, under your control.

post.summary: creates a new group
this functions helps you to map your application group ids to Etherpad group ids
deletes a group
returns all pads of this group
creates a new (non-group) pad
post.description: creates a new (non-group) pad. Note that if you need to create a group Pad, you should call createGroupPad

post.summary: creates a new pad in this group
creates a new author
this functions helps you to map your application author ids to Etherpad author ids
returns an array of all pads this author contributed to

returns all sessions of an author
